game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.

Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!
game_info.description: Battle through intense boss fights as Cuphead in this run-and-gun action game! Face off against a challenging boss with multiple attack patterns. Dodge projectiles, jump over obstacles, and shoot your way to victory. Defeat the boss before your health runs out to win. Master the timing and movement to survive increasingly difficult attack waves!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump (up arrow)
Z Key: Shoot projectiles at the boss
Space: Dash (quick dodge with brief invincibility)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)
ENTER: Start game

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and shooting mechanics. Validates that the player can move around the arena, jump, and fire projectiles. Ensures projectiles hit the boss and deal damage.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move left and right while continuously shooting. Jump occasionally to test vertical movement. Stay in the middle area to avoid getting cornered.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position changes in response to inputs. Projectiles spawn and travel toward the boss. Boss health decreases when hit. No crashes or errors occur during basic gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests winning condition by implementing optimal strategy to defeat the boss. Validates that aggressive play combined with good dodging leads to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Continuously shoot while moving to avoid projectiles. Use dash strategically to dodge through dense bullet patterns. Jump over ground-based attacks. Maintain aggressive positioning to maximize damage output.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Boss health depletes to zero before player health runs out. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Victory message displays with final score.
TEST_2.description: Tests winning condition by implementing optimal strategy to defeat the boss. Validates that aggressive play combined with good dodging leads to victory.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests defensive capabilities and dodging mechanics. Validates dash invincibility frames and collision detection systems work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on dodging attacks using dash and jumping. Move constantly to avoid projectiles. Test dash invincibility by deliberately dashing through projectiles. Shoot only when safe.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player successfully avoids damage during dash invincibility frames. Movement patterns effectively dodge most attacks. Collision detection works accurately without false positives.
TEST_3.description: Tests defensive capabilities and dodging mechanics. Validates dash invincibility frames and collision detection systems work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy: Focus on dodging attacks using dash and jumping. Move constantly to avoid projectiles. Test dash invincibility by deliberately dashing through projectiles. Shoot only when safe.
TEST_3.expected: Player successfully avoids damage during dash invincibility frames. Movement patterns effectively dodge most attacks. Collision detection works accurately without false positives.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests game over loss condition. Validates that taking too much damage results in proper game over state transition.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Stand still or move minimally to intentionally take damage from boss attacks. Do not shoot or dodge. Let health deplete completely.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player health decreases when hit by projectiles. When health reaches zero, game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Loss message displays properly.
TEST_4.description: Tests game over loss condition. Validates that taking too much damage results in proper game over state transition.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests boss behavior patterns and attack progression. Validates that boss uses different attack patterns and difficulty increases appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Survive for extended period while observing boss attack patterns. Move to trigger different attack types. Damage boss to specific health thresholds to test phase transitions.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Boss cycles through multiple distinct attack patterns. Attack frequency and complexity increase as boss health decreases. All attack patterns spawn correctly and behave as intended.
